title: malaxis incurviforceps
intro: Malaxis incurviforceps, also known as the incurved forceps orchid, is a species of orchid native to China. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malaxis incurviforceps include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
